Headline: Harlem-bound Green Line Delays
ShortDescription: Harlem-bound Green trains are running with residual delays following earlier police activity at Central. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Harlem-bound Green trains are running with residual delays following earlier police activity at Central.

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
